title: Student Academic Period Profiles
description: Information about a student for a specified academic period.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the student academic period profile.

person.title: Person
person.description: A reference to link a student to the common HEDM persons entity.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Person.

academicPeriod.title: Academic Period
academicPeriod.description: A term within an academic year (for example, Semester).

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Period.

studentStatus.title: Student Status
studentStatus.description: Status of the student for a given academic period.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Student Status.

type.title: Type
type.description: Type of the student for the academic period .

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Type.

residency.title: Residency
residency.description: The residency type of the student for the academic period (e.g.: international, in state, out of state, etc.).

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Residency.

academicPeriodEnrollmentStatus.title: Academic Period Enrollment Status
academicPeriodEnrollmentStatus.description: Status of the student enrollment for a given academic period.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Period Enrollment Status.

academicLoad.title: Academic Load
academicLoad.description: The relative load (full-time, part-time, overload) of a student during the academic period based on the number of contact hours or credits.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: A list of custom defined attributes or characteristics (tags) assigned to the student.

items.title: Tags
items.description: A list of custom defined attributes or characteristics (tags) assigned to the student.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Tags.

measures.title: Measures
measures.description: Measures (GPA, year classification) associated with the student for the academic period by academic level.

level.title: Level
level.description: A academic level associated with the student during the academic period.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Level.

performanceMeasure.title: Performance Measure
performanceMeasure.description: Measurement of the student's performance by academic level. (e.g. GPA).

classification.title: Classification
classification.description: The student's classification by academic level during the academic period. (E.g Freshman, Senior, ...)

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Classification.
